decisions.reasoning: ITMG opened at IDR 26,075 — below planned entry range 27,000-27,200, giving a better price with unchanged thesis. All 15 gates passed. headlines.headline: Q1 2026 EPS IDR 890 vs consensus IDR 416 — 114% earnings beat confirmed

ESDM HPM Decree 144 raised ore correction factor 17%→30%; nickel $17,635 (+4.81% MoM)
US-Iran 2-week ceasefire + Strait of Hormuz reopened — risk-ON signal for Monday open
Bank Indonesia holds BI-Rate at 4.75%; Governor: cut scope increasingly limited due to IDR pressure
Palm oil exports -34% in first 10 days of April; agri/CPO sector on AVOID list
Newcastle coal consolidating at $131/ton after March surge; Middle East risk premium intact (+40.5% YoY)
Rupiah at 17,115/USD near record lows; BI focused on stability over growth
